title: Proof of Freshness
tagline: Show a live number with a browser-computed SHA-256 proof of the exact bytes fetched right now.
holy_shit: It's not a screenshot: your browser fetched the live payload this second, hashed the exact bytes, and can prove the number came from that payload.
powered_by: runVerifiedCell() verifies the compute cell before execution, while crypto.subtle hashes the exact live response bytes in the visitor's browser
agent_scenario: When you need to prove a displayed live value was fetched now (not staged) and bind it to a browser-verifiable hash of the exact response bytes.
author: kody-w + Copilot
